mano_cua.result_summary: 移动端设备模式下，ng-select下拉面板在组件外触控拖拽滚动后意外关闭，搜索词同时被清除。桌面端鼠标滚轮滚动时下拉面板保持打开且搜索词保留，但移动端触控拖拽滑动时下拉面板关闭且搜索词消失，clickOutside/触摸事件处理逻辑将滚动误判为点击外部。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Mobile device emulation test: mouse scroll outside dropdown keeps it open and preserves search term, but touch drag (simulating mobile finger swipe) outside the dropdown closes it and clears the search term 'kar'. The ng-select clickOutside or touch event handling incorrectly treats mobile scroll as a click-outside event.
